title: Assurance Package (AP) MediSave
text:
Assurance Package (AP) MediSave - SupportGoWhere
Assurance Package (AP) MediSave
Share link
MediSave top-up of $150 each year from 2023 to 2025, for Singapore Citizens aged 20 and below, or 55 and above, residing in Singapore.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
$150 MediSave top-up each year, for Singapore Citizens aged 20 and below or 55 and above
Top-ups will be credited in February from 2023 to 2025
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

$150 MediSave top-up each year, for Singapore Citizens aged 20 and below or 55 and above from 2023 to 2025

Top-ups will be credited in February from 2023 to 2025

Who is this for?

For AP MediSave Payout in 2025

Singapore Citizen residing in Singapore; and

Aged 20 and below, or 55 and above in 2025

How to apply?

No application required.

Where can I find help?

View more details

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Contact us

Scheme last updated 29 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
